en: hey guys what's up welcome to jyoti classes guys i have a new advanced structure go behind
ko: 안녕하세요 여러분, Jyoti Classes에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 새로운 고급 구문을 알려드릴게요. go behind

en: one's word that means
apni baat se mukar jaana
aaye uska structure dekhte hain
subject plus helping verb plus go behind one's word plus other words
ko: 주어 + 조동사 + go behind one's word + 기타 단어

en: guys yaha ba jo go hai according to tense change
jo ka go going back
ones ki jagah personal pronoun use karenge agar hai to
my, yours, his, her, their, etc
ko: my, yours, his, her, their 등

en: aur agar koi other words hai
if any is there use them
let's follow some examples
aap hammesha apni baat se mukar jaate ho
you always go behind your word
ko: you always go behind your word

en: you always go behind your word
ko: you always go behind your word

en: aap apni baat se mukar nahi sakte
now you can't go behind your word
ko: now you can't go behind your word

en: unhone ek ring gift karne ka promise kiya tha
lekin ab wo apni baat se mukar rahe hain
he promised to gift a gold ring
ko: he promised to gift a gold ring

en: but now he is going behind his word
ko: but now he is going behind his word

en: aksar apni baat se mukar jaaye karti thi wo
she often used to go behind her word
ko: she often used to go behind her word

share and subscribe and
comment
